description_blocks: Arof Mesh 2*2 is 100% polyester, 50-60 g/m² warp knitted 2*2 mesh fabric.
Due to mesh structure it can provide both safety for the material and transparency.
It can be used as a bag's side pocket, parka interlining, raincoat back fabric and car seat's back cover.

technical_parameters.value: Mesh for Bag, Car Seat, Raincoat

Arof Mesh 2*2 is 100% polyester, 50-60 g/m² warp knitted 2*2 mesh fabric. Due to mesh structure it can provide both safety for the material and transparency. It can be used as a bag's side pocket, parka interlining, raincoat back fabric and car seat's back cover. , 100% Polyester, 2*2 Mesh Fabric
Arof Mesh 2*2 is 100% polyester, 50-60 g/m² warp knitted 2*2 mesh fabric.
Due to mesh structure it can provide both safety for the material and transparency.
It can be used as a bag's side pocket, parka interlining, raincoat back fabric and car seat's back cover.
